name: Apple Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder with salt.
2. Cut in shortening using two spatulas until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add milk and mix quickly and lightly.
4. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and roll into an oblong sheet about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Brush with melted butter.
6. Cover the apples, mixing brown sugar and cinnamon.
7. Roll up like a jelly roll.
8. Cut into slices, about 1 1/2 inches thick.
9. Sprinkle brown sugar over the bottom of an oiled pan.
10. Place rolls cutwise in the pan.
11. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for about 40 minutes.
